<summary>
执行文件结构创建：src/目录、main.py、README.md、.gitignore

<minimax:tool_call>

```python
import os

workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/us_federal/20260325T115201Z/workspaces/task_09_files/run_01"

# 1. Create src/ directory
src_dir = os.path.join(workspace, "src")
os.makedirs(src_dir, exist_ok=True)
print(f"Created directory: {src_dir}")

# 2. Create src/main.py with hello world
main_py = os.path.join(src_dir, "main.py")
with open(main_py, "w") as f:
    f.write("print('Hello, World!')\n")
print(f"Created file: {main_py}")

# 3. Create README.md with project title
readme = os.path.join(workspace, "README.md")
with open(readme, "w") as f:
    f.write("# File Structure Project\n")
print(f"Created file: {readme}")

# 4. Create .gitignore with __pycache__
gitignore = os.path.join(workspace, ".gitignore")
with open(gitignore, "w") as f:
    f.write("__pycache__\n")
print(f"Created file: {gitignore}")

# Verify all files exist
print("\n=== Verification ===")
for path in [src_dir, main_py, readme, gitignore]:
    exists = os.path.exists(path)
    print(f"{path}: {'EXISTS' if exists else 'MISSING'}")
```
</tool_use>

import os

workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/us_federal/20260325T115201Z/workspaces/task_09_files/run_01"

# 1. Create src/ directory
src_dir = os.path.join(workspace, "src")
os.makedirs(src_dir, exist_ok=True)
print(f"Created directory: {src_dir}")

# 2. Create src/main.py with hello world
main_py = os.path.join(src_dir, "main.py")
with open(main_py, "w") as f:
    f.write("print('Hello, World!')\n")
print(f"Created file: {main_py}")

# 3. Create README.md with project title
readme = os.path.join(workspace, "README.md")
with open(readme, "w") as f:
    f.write("# File Structure Project\n")
print(f"Created file: {readme}")

# 4. Create .gitignore with __pycache__
gitignore = os.path.join(workspace, ".gitignore")
with open(gitignore, "w") as f:
    f.write("__pycache__\n")
print(f"Created file: {gitignore}")

# Verify all files exist
print("\n=== Verification ===")
for path in [src_dir, main_py, readme, gitignore]:
    exists = os.path.exists(path)
    print(f"{path}: {'EXISTS' if exists else 'MISSING'}")
```
